name: ldo_pm
description: LDO phase-margin spec violation. circuit-simulation opens a fix_request (default route -> circuit-design). The error-amp compensation is re-tuned and the spec passes on the first re-validation cycle. A tapeout_signoff checkpoint gates final sign-off and is approved.

fr_ldo_pm_001.diff_summary: Increased Miller cap Cc 1.2pF -> 2.0pF, added 8k nulling resistor, re-biased tail. PM now 64 deg at the failing corner.
